ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "question_title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the problem was last updated */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Detailed statement of the problem */,
  "example_input" TEXT /* Example input for the problem */,
  "example_output" TEXT /* Example output for the problem */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Constraints for the problem (e.g., time limit, memory limit) */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of the problem (e.g., algorithm, data structure, SQL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, problem setter, solver) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "password_reset_expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration time for password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Design, Array, Binary Search) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_topics" (
  "problem_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem-topic relationship */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "is_primary_topic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary topic for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_topics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, dislike) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user during interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_metrics" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the problem */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the problem */,
  "wilson_score" REAL /* Wilson score to gauge the problem's popularity */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metrics were last calculated */,
  "average_execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time of all submissions for the problem */,
  "average_memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage of all submissions for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being attempted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the attempt */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the attempt */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attempt was successful */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the solution in milliseconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the solution in MB */,
  "language_used" TEXT /* Programming language used for the attempt */,
  "code_submitted" TEXT /* Code submitted for the attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_attempts_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is publicly visible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_discussions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_versions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tags" (
  "problem_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem-tag relationship */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tags_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* Image representing the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-badge relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge */,
  "awarded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the badge was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notify_settings" (
  "notify_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notify_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if notifications of this type are enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notify_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notify_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notify_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
